violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as chicken base) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as chicken base during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (hot water dispenser) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
